# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refacto` — refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage` passes (coverage stays above 90%)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, and `skills/ffm-script/SKILL.md` updated if the public API changed
- [ ] No version bump in `package.json` (releases are maintainer-only)
